name: @feed/sim
description: Feed Sim — standalone system engine with CLI, config loading, and auto-import scanning

scripts.lint: cd ../.. && bunx @biomejs/biome check --write --unsafe --config-path ../../biome.json --files-ignore-unknown=true --no-errors-on-unmatched packages/sim/package.json packages/sim/tsconfig.json packages/sim/README.md
scripts.lint:check: cd ../.. && bunx @biomejs/biome check --config-path ../../biome.json --files-ignore-unknown=true --no-errors-on-unmatched packages/sim/package.json packages/sim/tsconfig.json packages/sim/README.md
scripts.lint:fix: cd ../.. && bunx @biomejs/biome check --write --unsafe --config-path ../../biome.json --files-ignore-unknown=true --no-errors-on-unmatched packages/sim/package.json packages/sim/tsconfig.json packages/sim/README.md
scripts.format: cd ../.. && bunx @biomejs/biome format --write --config-path ../../biome.json --files-ignore-unknown=true packages/sim/package.json packages/sim/tsconfig.json packages/sim/README.md
scripts.format:check: cd ../.. && bunx @biomejs/biome format --config-path ../../biome.json --files-ignore-unknown=true packages/sim/package.json packages/sim/tsconfig.json packages/sim/README.md
